ab: Pasifana’en ho kami tisowanan!
Ci Canglah Kaynga kako, mo^etepay ko mihecaan ako.
en: My name is Canglah Kaynga, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Cima ko ngangan iso?
Ci Canglah Kaynga kako.
O maan a kasafinacadan a wawa kiso?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: O wawa no ’Amis kako.
Saheto o Yincomin ko paro no loma’ iso haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Hai, saheto o ’Amis ko paro no loma’ niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: Saheto o Yincomin ko paro no loma’ iso haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Caayay, o ’Amis ko wama ako, o Payrang ko wina ako.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: Nima a wawa kiso?
Ni Mayaw Lohok a wawa kako.
Ci wama iso kora haw? pina to ko mihecaan ningra?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Enem polo’ to ko mihecaan ningra.
Ci wama iso kora haw? pina to ko mihecaan ningra?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Caayay, o mato’say niyam cingra i niyaro’, falo polo’ to ko mihecaan ningra.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Pina to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka iso?
Safaw falo to ko mihecaan no fa’inayan a kaka ako.
Hakowaay ko karaaraay no mihecaan namo?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Lima a mihecaan ko karaaraay niyam.
Hakowaay ko ’akawang iso?
Cecay so’ot sepat polo’ a kongfen ko ’akawang ako.
Halafin to caka saso’araw kita, ’akawangay to kiso?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Hai, cecay so’ot tolo polo’ a kongfen ko ’akawang ako.
Masoesoay to kiso haw?
Caayay, mararaw ko pinengneng iso.
Mangiriway to kiso haw?
Caayay, masoesoay to kako.
Masoesoay to kiso haw?
Hai, tolo polo’ to ko tingting ako hatini.
